assertion_results.text: The remediation output describes the digest protocol for the upstream backport task: re-fetching the task description from Jira after create_issue and computing a SHA-256 digest using scripts/sha256-digest.py (§1.66)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 103-122 of remediation.md: 'Description Digest Comment Steps' for Task 1 (Upstream Backport) include Step 1 re-fetching via jira.get_issue('TC-XXXX', fields=['description']) and Step 2 computing digest via 'python3 scripts/sha256-digest.py /tmp/task-desc.md'.

assertion_results.text: The remediation output describes the digest protocol for the downstream propagation subtask: re-fetching the task description from Jira after create_issue and computing a SHA-256 digest using scripts/sha256-digest.py (§1.66)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 199-218 of remediation.md: 'Description Digest Comment Steps' for Task 2 (Downstream Propagation) include Step 1 re-fetching via jira.get_issue('TC-YYYY', fields=['description']) and Step 2 computing digest via 'python3 scripts/sha256-digest.py /tmp/task-desc.md'.

assertion_results.text: The remediation output includes the digest comment marker '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:' in the described steps for each remediation task — both upstream and downstream (§1.66)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 120 (upstream): jira.add_comment('TC-XXXX', '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: <tagged-digest>'). Line 217 (downstream): jira.add_comment('TC-YYYY', '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: <tagged-digest>'). Both contain the exact marker string.

assertion_results.text: The remediation output sequences digest comments BEFORE issue links (Depend, Blocks) or other comments in the described procedure for each task (§1.66, shared/description-digest-protocol.md Rules)
assertion_results.evidence: Upstream: Step 3 (line 118) posts digest comment, Step 4 (line 124) creates links with note 'THEN create issue links (sequenced AFTER the digest comment)'. Downstream: Step 3 (line 215) posts digest comment, Step 4 (line 220) creates Blocks/Related links with same sequencing note. Complete Sequencing (lines 239-256) confirms: Phase 1 step 4 (digest) before step 5 (link); Phase 2 step 9 (digest) before steps 10-11 (links).

assertion_results.text: The remediation output specifies that the digest is computed from the re-fetched description (via Jira API after create_issue), not from the description string passed to create_issue (shared/description-digest-protocol.md Hashing)
assertion_results.evidence: Upstream Step 1 (line 105): 'Re-fetch the task description from Jira (do NOT use the description string passed to create_issue -- Jira normalizes content during storage)'. Downstream Step 1 (line 201): identical instruction. Digest Protocol Key Rules (line 282): 'Always re-fetch the description from Jira after create_issue. Do NOT hash the description string passed to create_issue -- Jira normalizes content during storage and the stored version may differ.'
